action.reasoning: Observation: Current best exploration_score=0.5588 (from proxy on 6 maps: success_rate=1.0, explored=1.0, avg_dist~396-407m, proxy~0.8). Full test eval (150 maps) not triggered in harness due to missing eval_config.json in /data + previously truncated/buggy predict.py (UnboundLocalError, syntax). Myopic baseline was only 0.0196. Analysis: The provided global heuristic (max utility/(dist**alpha+1) target via BFS on node graph + next-hop stepping) is strong, standard frontier exploration, gets perfect proxy success, uses real ExplorationEnv, 0 params (<=50M limit). Root cause of low harness scores was incomplete predict.py lacking robust config/map loading, per-episode exception handling, correct per_type (success-only dist), and exact JSON contract. Decision: Provide COMPLETE robust predict.py (full select_waypoint with alpha=1.5 support, config parsing with fallback to maps_eval/maps_train glob, try/except per map, type inference, exact output format, proxy with 3 maps/type). Update train.py with alpha=1.5 + improved description. Run train+predict for validation (expect similar/better proxy), submit_eval on fixed checkpoint to get official test score and measure full-eval time for planning future long runs.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
